---
title: "SEM"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("Code/paths+packages.R"))

library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(corrr)
library(corrplot)
library(cluster)
library(beepr)
library(glue)
library(cowplot)
library(ggExtra)
library(piecewiseSEM)
library(easystats)
set.seed(4) # For reproducibility
gpSites <- c("#1b9e77", "#d95f02", "#7570b3")
```

# Load Data

```{r}
sheet_id <- 
all_sheets <- map(c("Talladega", "Paint Rock", "Weyerhaeuser"), \(name) {
  read_sheet("1uQquFaVpRFs5y4UDBrqKtq1Oo3dW7zXLwFoIv-gle6g", sheet = name, col_types = "c") |>
    mutate(Site = name)
})

seMaint <- bind_rows(all_sheets) |> 
    janitor::clean_names() |> 
  mutate(
    temp_c = coalesce(temp_c, temperature_c),
    stage_m = coalesce(staff_gauge_height_m, staff_gauge_height),
    # Safely combine date + time
    Date = mdy(date)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site = site, Date, connected = connected_and_flowing, upstream = upstream_tribs_flowing, site_notes, do_mg_l, stage_m, temp_c) |> 
  mutate(
    connected = str_to_lower(connected),
    upstream = str_to_lower(upstream),
    flow_state = case_when(
      connected == "yes" ~ "Flowing",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "yes" ~ "Pooled",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "no" ~ "Dry",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    flow_state = case_when(
      (flow_state %in% c("Dry", NA)) &
        str_detect(str_to_lower(site_notes), "\\b(flow|flowing|pool|pooled|isolated|low)\\b") ~ "Pooled",
      TRUE ~ flow_state
    )
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, wetQf = flow_state) |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      str_starts(Site, "T") ~ "TAL",
      str_starts(Site, "W") ~ "WHR",
      str_starts(Site, "P") ~ "PRF",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))
```

```{r}
flowObs <- read_csv(here("Metadata/FlowObs.csv"))

streamLight <- read_csv(here("Data/streamLight/predLight/all_sites_results.csv")) |> 
  rename(Site = Site_ID) |> 
  mutate(
    Date = as_date(local_time),
    Site = case_when(
    Site == "SFM01" ~ "KNZ",
    Site == "SHM01" ~ "SHN",
    Site == "ENM01" ~ "YMR",
    TRUE ~ Site  # keep other values unchanged
  )) |> 
    group_by(Site, Date) |>
  summarise(maxPar = max(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            avgPar = mean(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

nasaET <- read_csv(here("Data/nasaET.csv"))
# Load GP
gpDat <- fread(here("Data/GP_dailyData.csv")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp,
    -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs,
    -dPercCon, -wetdry_SW
  ) |>
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |>
  left_join(streamLight, by = c("Site", "Date"))

# Load SE
seDat <- fread(here("Data/SE_dailyData.csv")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp,
    -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs
  ) |>
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |>
  full_join(seMaint)

# Combine 
allDat <- gpDat |>
  full_join(seDat) |>
  left_join(nasaET) |> 
  dplyr::select(-excProb, -DOSat.exc) |>
  mutate(
    waterYear = as.factor(calcWaterYear(Date)),
    Season = as.factor(get_season(Date)),
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    DOY = as.numeric(format(Date, "%j")),
         DOY_sin = sin(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date))),
         DOY_cos = cos(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date)))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-totalDO) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(
    excProb = calc_exceedance_prob(Q_1d, rm.zero = TRUE),
    DOSat.exc = calc_exceedance_prob(avgDO.pctsat, rm.zero = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

# Calculate stage thresholds for each site
flowThresh <- allDat |>
  drop_na(wetQf) |>
  group_by(Site, wetQf) |>
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(wetQf == "Pooled" & !is.na(mean) & !is.na(sd)) |>
  mutate(thresh = mean + sd) |>
  dplyr::select(Site, thresh)

# Assign flowState based on threshold
allDat <- allDat |>
  left_join(flowThresh, by = "Site") |>
  mutate(across(
    .cols = matches("Depth_|maxDepth|minDepth"),
    .fns = \(x) ifelse(x < 0, 0, x)
  )) |> 
  mutate(
    percentConnected = percentConnected/100,
    flowState = case_when(
      is.na(thresh) ~ NA_character_,
      Depth_1d > thresh ~ "Flowing",
      TRUE ~ "Pooled"
    )
  ) |> 
  select(-c(ICSL, AlphaCentrality, Harary, IntactStreamLength, upstream_length, percentConnected, PercWet_1d, PercWet_7d, PercWet_14d, PercWet_30d))

rm(streamLight, gpDat, seDat, flowThresh, flowObs)

## New Alpha centrality
sticAC <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/streamDAG_metrics.csv")) |> 
  rename(Date = date, Site = watershed) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR", "TAL", "WHR", "PRF")) |> 
  select(Site, Date, PercWet_1d = percent_network_wet, upstream_length = active_upstream_length, a_cent_weighted) |> 
  mutate(upstream_length = ifelse(is.na(upstream_length), 0, upstream_length))


allDat <- allDat |> 
  left_join(sticAC) |> 
  mutate(Q_1d = ifelse(is.na(Q_1d), 0, Q_1d))

```

```{r}
#| include: false

numeric_vars <- allDat |>
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  names() |>
  setdiff("DOY")

# Open a single PDF file
pdf(here("Figs/allDat_plots_scaled.pdf"),
    width = 8,
    height = 6)

# Generate and save plots to the PDF
suppressMessages(lapply(numeric_vars, \(var) {
  allDat |>
    group_by(Site) |>
    dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
    ungroup() |>
    ggplot(aes(
      x = Date,
      y = !!sym(var),
      color = Site
    )) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(x = "", y = var) +
    theme_few() +
    scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
    scale_x_date() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) |>
    print()
}))

# Close the PDF
dev.off()


# Open a single PDF file
pdf(here("Figs/allDat_plots.pdf"),
    width = 8,
    height = 6)

# Generate and save plots to the PDF
suppressMessages(lapply(numeric_vars, \(var) {
  allDat |>
    ggplot(aes(
      x = Date,
      y = !!sym(var),
      color = Site
    )) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(x = "", y = var) +
    theme_few() +
    scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
    scale_x_date() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) |>
    print()
}))

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```

## Autocorrelation

```{r}
vars <- c("ET_mm_day", "PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "a_cent_weighted", "upstream_length","Depth", "Q", "excProb")
 


dat_long <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !matches("PercWet|dPerc|DOY"), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(Site, Date), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

calc_acf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  acf_out <- acf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = acf_out$lag[,1,1],
    acf = acf_out$acf[,1,1],
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}
calc_pacf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  pacf_out <- pacf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = pacf_out$lag,
    pacf = pacf_out$acf,
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}

acf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(acf_tbl = list(calc_acf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(acf_tbl)

pacf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(pacf_tbl = list(calc_pacf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(pacf_tbl)

acf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = acf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#D6EAF8", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#0072B2", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "ACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "ACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

pacf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = pacf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#F8CFC3", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Partial Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "PACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "PACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
```

## Correlation

```{r}
vars <- c("ET_mm_day", "PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "flowState", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "a_cent_weighted", "upstream_length","Depth", "Q", "excProb", "DOY", "waterYear")


semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  mutate(#flowState = factor(flowState),
    # flowState = case_when(flowState == "Pooled"~0,
    #                       flowState == "Flowing"~1,
    #                       T~NA), 
    Site = factor(Site))

png(here("Figs/Corr.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

png(here("Figs/Corr_5.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    cor_mat[abs(cor_mat) < 0.5] <- NA
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

png(here("Figs/Corr_75.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    cor_mat[abs(cor_mat) < 0.75] <- NA
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

```

# Piecewise SEM

```{r}
semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) 
```

```{r}
source(here("Code/Functions/prune_sem.R"))
# semDat <- semDat |>
#   group_by(Site) |> 
#   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
#   ungroup() 

# Assign domain groups
domain_colors <- c(
  Biology = "#BBBB00",
  Hydrology = "#E69F00",
  DO = "#0077BB"
)

# Assign each variable to a domain
var_domains <- c(
  ET_mm_day = "Biology",
  avgPar = "Biology",
  PPT_14d = "Biology",
  water.temp = "Biology",
  upstream_length = "Hydrology",
  PercWet = "Hydrology",
  alpha_cent = "Hydrology",
  Depth = "Hydrology",
  excProb = "Hydrology",
  Q = "Hydrology",
  headGradient = "Hydrology",
  DOSat.exc = "DO",
  DOpctsat.amp = "DO",
  avgDO.pctsat = "DO"
)

# Assign each variable to a domain
var_labels <- c(
  ET_mm_day = "ET",
  avgPar = "PAR",
  PPT_14d = "14 Day PPT",
  water.temp = "Water Temp",
  upstream_length = "Upstream Length",
  PercWet = "% Network Wet",
  alpha_cent = "Alpha Centrality",
  Depth = "Depth",
  excProb = "Exceedance Probability",
  Q = "Discharge",
  headGradient = "Head Gradient",
  DOSat.exc = "DO Exceedance",
  DOpctsat.amp = "DO Amplitude",
  avgDO.pctsat = "Mean DO"
)
suppressWarnings(rm(acf_results, all_sheets, dat_long, p, pacf_results, seMaint, gpSites, okabeIto))
```

```{r}
numeric_vars <- semDat |>
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  names() |>
  setdiff("DOY")

# Generate one ggplot per numeric variable
plots <- lapply(numeric_vars, \(var) {
  semDat |>
    ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = !!sym(var), color = waterYear)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
    labs(
      x = "DOY",
      y = var
    ) +
    theme_few() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 1)
})

# Optional: name plots list for easier reference
names(plots) <- numeric_vars

plots

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = log(water.temp), color = waterYear)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "log(water.temp)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 1)

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = log(avgPar), color = waterYear)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "log(avgPar)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 1)

sem_vars <- c(
  "ET_mm_day",
  "avgPar", "PPT_14d",
  "water.temp",
  "upstream_length",
  "PercWet",
  "excProb",
  "Depth",
  "headGradient",
  "DOSat.exc",
  "DOpctsat.amp",
  "avgDO.pctsat"
)


semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = Depth, color = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "log(water.temp)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~waterYear, ncol = 1)
```

```{r}
semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)

semStd <- semDat |>
  datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc))

semDat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  mutate(log_upstream_length = log1p(upstream_length)) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")


semStd |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
semStd |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Scaled Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
```

# glmmTMB

```{r}
library(glmmTMB)
semStd <- semStd |>
  drop_na()

# Biology
ET_mm_day <- glmmTMB(
  ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(link = "identity"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

water.temp <- glmmTMB(
  water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),  # Approximately normal
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- glmmTMB(
  upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day +  (1|Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),
  ziformula = ~1,
  #family = gaussian(link = "identity"),  # Heavy right-skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

PercWet <- glmmTMB(
  PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site) + (1|Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(link = "identity"),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # (0, 1) bounded, multimodal
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Depth/Q
excProb <- glmmTMB(
  excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(link = "identity"),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # (0, 1) bounded
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

headGradient <- glmmTMB(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(), # Bell-shaped with slight skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

avgDO.pctsat <- glmmTMB(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # Uniform [0,1]
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

DOpctsat.amp <- glmmTMB(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Create a list of model objects
model_list <- list(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
)

is_singular <- model_list |> lapply(check_singularity) |> bind_rows()
convergence_issues <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) m$fit$convergence) |> bind_rows()
inclass <- model_list |> lapply(icc) |> bind_rows()

plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(model_list), model_list)

# Display all plots
plots


# drop1_results <- lapply(model_list, function(mod) {
#   tryCatch(
#     drop1(mod, test = "Chisq"),
#     error = function(e) e  # catch models where drop1 fails (e.g., zero-inflated)
#   )
# })
#single_sem <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) summary(psem(m)))

#Generate and store the check_model plots in a list
plot_list <- model_list |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/sem_model_diagnostics.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()

```

```{r}

all_mod <- psem(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  avgDO.pctsat %~~% DOpctsat.amp,
  PercWet %~~% upstream_length
)
all_summary <- summary(all_mod, standardize = "none") 

pruned_mod <- remove_weak_paths(sem_model =  all_mod)

pruned_summary <-  summary(pruned_mod, standardize = "none")  

plot_sem_graph(all_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(all_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem_chord.png"))

plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(pruned_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem_chord.png"))


```

## W/ Depth

```{r}
library(cowplot) # For arranging plots

# Function to create biplots
create_biplot <- function(response_var, predictors, data, title) {
  # Create a long format dataframe for plotting
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    Response = data[[response_var]],
    data[, predictors]
  )
  
  # Convert to long format
  plot_data_long <- tidyr::gather(plot_data, key = "Predictor", value = "Value", -Response)
  
  # Create the plot
  ggplot(plot_data_long, aes(x = Value, y = Response)) +
    geom_point2(alpha = 0.3, na.rm = T) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
    facet_wrap(~ Predictor, scales = "free_x") +
    labs(title = title, 
         x = "Predictor Value", 
         y = response_var) +
    theme_modern() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
}

# Define predictors
predictors <- c("water.temp", "avgPar", "excProb", "headGradient", 
                "upstream_length", "PercWet", "PPT_14d", "ET_mm_day")

# Create plots for DOSat.exc
p1 <- create_biplot("DOSat.exc", predictors, semDat, "Unstandardized Data - DOSat.exc")
p2 <- create_biplot("DOSat.exc", predictors, semStd, "Standardized Data - DOSat.exc")

# Create plots for DOpctsat.amp
p3 <- create_biplot("DOpctsat.amp", predictors, semDat, "Unstandardized Data - DOpctsat.amp")
p4 <- create_biplot("DOpctsat.amp", predictors, semStd, "Standardized Data - DOpctsat.amp")

# Arrange and display plots
plot_grid(p1, p2)
plot_grid(p3, p4)

```

```{r}
semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)

semStd <- semDat# |>
  #datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc))

semDat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  mutate(log_upstream_length = log1p(upstream_length)) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")


semStd |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
semStd |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Scaled Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
```

```{r}
library(glmmTMB)
semStd <- semStd |>
  drop_na() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    upstream_length = upstream_length + 0.001,
    ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day + 0.001,
    excProb = (excProb + 0.001) / 1.002,
    PercWet = (PercWet + 0.001) / 100.002
  )

# Biology
ET_mm_day <- glmmTMB(
  ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

water.temp <- glmmTMB(
  water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),  # Approximately normal
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- glmmTMB(
  upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day +  (1|Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"), ziformula = ~1,
  #family = gaussian(link = "identity"),  # Heavy right-skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

PercWet <- glmmTMB(
  PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site) + (1|Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores,
                           optimizer = optim,
                           optArgs = list(method="BFGS"))
)

# Depth/Q
excProb <- glmmTMB(
  excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),  # (0, 1) bounded
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores,
                           optimizer = optim,
                           optArgs = list(method="BFGS")))

headGradient <- glmmTMB(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(), # Bell-shaped with slight skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

avgDO.pctsat <- glmmTMB(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # Uniform [0,1]
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores, 
                           optimizer = optim,
                           optArgs = list(method="BFGS")))

DOpctsat.amp <- glmmTMB(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Create a list of model objects
model_list <- list(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
)


is_singular <- model_list |> lapply(check_singularity) |> bind_rows()
convergence_issues <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) m$fit$convergence) |> bind_rows()
inclass <- model_list |> lapply(icc) |> bind_rows()

plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(model_list), model_list)

# Display all plots
plots


# drop1_results <- lapply(model_list, function(mod) {
#   tryCatch(
#     drop1(mod, test = "Chisq"),
#     error = function(e) e  # catch models where drop1 fails (e.g., zero-inflated)
#   )
# })
#single_sem <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) summary(psem(m)))

#Generate and store the check_model plots in a list
plot_list <- model_list |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/sem_model_diagnostics.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()

```

# 

```{r}

all_mod <- psem(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  avgDO.pctsat %~~% DOpctsat.amp,
  PercWet %~~% upstream_length
)
all_summary <- summary(all_mod) 

pruned_mod <- remove_weak_paths(sem_model =  all_mod)

pruned_summary <-  summary(pruned_mod, standardize = "none")  

plot_sem_graph(all_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(all_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem_chord.png"))

plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(pruned_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem_chord.png"))


```

```{r}

```

### 

```{r}

```

### Pooled Model

```{r}

```

### Flowing Model

```{r}

```

```{r}
relabel_path <- function(path, labels) {
  # Replace variable names in "response ~ predictor" format
  for (old in names(labels)) {
    new <- labels[[old]]
    path <- gsub(paste0("\\b", old, "\\b"), new, path)
  }
  path
}

## Flowing and Pooled Model Fit
pruned_summary
pooled_pruned_summary
flowing_pruned_summary

# List your SEM model summaries
sem_models <- list(
  Both = pruned_summary,
  Pooled = pooled_pruned_summary,
  Flowing = flowing_pruned_summary
)

# Extract all unique paths across models
extract_paths <- function(sem_summary) {
  coefs <- sem_summary$coefficients
  paste(coefs$Response, "˿", coefs$Predictor)
}

# Collect all paths from all models
all_paths <- sem_models |>
  lapply(extract_paths) |>
  unlist() |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

# Build a presence matrix
path_matrix <- sapply(sem_models, function(sem_summary) {
  model_paths <- extract_paths(sem_summary)
  all_paths %in% model_paths
})

# Convert to a data frame for better readability
path_table <- data.frame(
  Path = all_paths,
  as.data.frame(path_matrix)
)

# Optionally, convert logicals to checkmarks for display
path_table_formatted <- path_table |>
  dplyr::mutate(across(-Path, ~ ifelse(.x, "✅", "❌")))

# Keep only rows where pooled and flowing differ
diff_paths <- path_table[path_table$Pooled != path_table$Flowing, ]
diff_paths <- diff_paths |> 
  dplyr::mutate(across(-Path, ~ ifelse(.x, "✅", "❌")))

# Use HTML subscript formatting
var_labels <- c(
  "DOpctsat.amp" = "DO<sub>% Sat</sub> Amplitude",
  "DOSat.exc" = "DO<sub>% Sat</sub> Exceedance",
  "PPT_14d" = "2 Week Precip",
  "upstream_length" = "Upstream Length",
  "water.temp" = "Temp",
  "headGradient" = "Head Gradient",
  "excProb" = "Exceedance Probability",
  "PercWet" = "% Network Wet"
)

# Relabel paths
diff_paths <- diff_paths |>
  mutate(Path = relabel_path(Path, var_labels))

# Create HTML table and preview
path_kable <- diff_paths |>
  kable(format = "html", escape = FALSE,  # <- allow HTML tags
        align = "lccc", col.names = c("Path", "Both", "Pooled", "Flowing")) |>
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = FALSE)

# Save as temporary HTML
html_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
save_kable(path_kable, file = html_file)

# High-resolution screenshot using zoom (2x or 3x usually looks great)
webshot2::webshot(
  url = html_file,
  file = here("Figs/PathTable.png"),
  zoom = 6      # Try 2 or 3 for better resolution
)



# View the table
diff_paths |>
  tibble::as_tibble() |>
  print(n = Inf)
library(kableExtra)
path_kable <- diff_paths |>
  tibble::as_tibble() |>
  kable(format = "html", align = "lccc", col.names = c("Path", "Both", "Pooled", "Flowing")) |> 
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = F)

# Save as temporary HTML
html_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
save_kable(path_kable, file = html_file)

# High-resolution screenshot using zoom (2x or 3x usually looks great)
webshot2::webshot(
  url = html_file,
  file = here("Figs/PathTable.png"),
  zoom = 6      # Try 2 or 3 for better resolution
)

coef_pooled <- pooled_pruned_summary$coefficients
coef_flowing <- flowing_pruned_summary$coefficients
merged_coefs <- full_join(
  coef_pooled |> select(1:8) |> mutate(model = "pooled") |> select(Response, Predictor, Estimate, Std.Estimate, model),
  coef_flowing |> select(1:8)  |> mutate(model = "flowing") |> select(Response, Predictor, Estimate, Std.Estimate, model),
  by = c("Response", "Predictor"),
  suffix = c("_pooled", "_flowing")
)

changed_paths <- merged_coefs |>
  filter(
    sign(Std.Estimate_pooled) != sign(Std.Estimate_flowing) |
      abs(Std.Estimate_pooled - Std.Estimate_flowing) > 0.25
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    direction_changed = sign(Std.Estimate_pooled) != sign(Std.Estimate_flowing),
    abs_diff = abs(Std.Estimate_pooled - Std.Estimate_flowing),
    mean_abs = (abs(Std.Estimate_pooled) + abs(Std.Estimate_flowing)) / 2,
    percent_diff = ifelse(mean_abs == 0, NA, 100 * abs_diff / mean_abs)
  ) |> 
  select(-model_pooled, -model_flowing)
```

```{r}
# Select numeric predictors (excluding response variables)
sem_vars <- c(
  "avgPar", "PPT_14d",
  "water.temp",
  "upstream_length",
  "PercWet",
  "excProb",
  "headGradient",
  "DOSat.exc",
  "DOpctsat.amp"
)

semDat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")

sem_plot_data <- semDat |>
  select(flowState, all_of(sem_vars), Site) |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric),
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE),
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup()
# Define response variables
response_vars <- c("DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc")

# Get predictor vars (everything else in sem_vars)
predictor_vars <- setdiff(sem_vars, response_vars)

# Pivot to long format
long_sem_data <- sem_plot_data |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(predictor_vars), names_to = "Predictor", values_to = "x") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(response_vars), names_to = "Response", values_to = "y")

# Example Plot: DOpctsat.amp faceted by Predictor and flowState
plot_amp <- long_sem_data |>
  filter(Response == "DOpctsat.amp") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  facet_grid(flowState ~ Predictor, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "", y = "DOpctsat.amp") +
  theme_few(base_size = 20)

# Example Plot: DOSat.exc faceted by Predictor and flowState
plot_exc <- long_sem_data |>
  filter(Response == "DOSat.exc") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  facet_grid(flowState ~ Predictor, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "", y = "DOSat.exc") +
  theme_few(base_size = 20)

# Display plots
plot_amp
plot_exc

ggsave(filename = "doAmpLM.png", plot = plot_amp, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "in", dpi = 600)
ggsave(filename = "doExcLM.png", plot = plot_exc, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```
